inputs.titre: Léonard de Vinci conçoit des plans pour des machines volantes et des ponts complexes

reason: The image depicts a man resembling Leonardo da Vinci working on sketches. The clothing style (doublet, trunk hose), the stone walls, candle lighting, parchment documents, and drawings are consistent with the 15th-century Renaissance period. There are no explicitly fantastical elements. However, the pen he's using appears to be a modern fountain pen, which is an anachronism. Also, the pictures on the wall do not resemble the style of the renaissance.
